<!--
Thanks for the contribution! Please fill in the sections below so
reviewers can land your change quickly.

If this is a draft / WIP, mark the PR as "Draft" instead of leaving
sections empty.
-->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves. Link related issues with `Fixes #123` or
     `Refs #456`. If there is no issue, explain the user-visible impact. -->

## How

<!-- The approach you took. Mention any non-obvious choices, trade-offs,
     or things you considered and rejected. -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify the change works? Commands, screenshots, or
     manual steps. If you added automated tests, mention where. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My change focuses on a single concern (no drive-by refactors).
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior changed (README,
      PLANNING, BRIDGES, comments).
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets or personal data.
- [ ] All committed content is in **English** (per project policy).
- [ ] For schema changes: I added a new migration file rather than
      editing an existing one.
